name: Divots Indoor Golf
about: Divots Indoor Golf is an indoor golf facility featuring advanced Trackman simulators for players of all skill levels. The venue offers an extensive library of over 360 meticulously detailed courses, including world-renowned locations like St Andrews and Pebble Beach. Open Tuesday through Sunday from 7am to 10pm, with 24-hour access memberships available, the facility provides a climate-controlled environment for playing, practicing, and improving one's game. Simulators can accommodate up to four players per bay, with private lessons and group workshops also offered for personalized instruction.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman technology for accurate swing analysis
Over 360 world-class courses available for play
Semi-private bays provide a relaxed and focused environment
Staffless model allows for total freedom and flexibility

food_and_drink.notes: You are welcome to bring your own food. The venue also offers a selection of snacks and beverages on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art Trackman simulators are the core hardware.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You are welcome to bring your own clubs, but we also have Men's, Women's, and Kids loaner clubs available. All clubs, balls, and shoes must be clean prior to play.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Absolutely! You are welcome to bring your own food and drinks. We also offer a selection of snacks and beverages on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Most players should book 1 hour per player for 18 holes. Advanced golfers can finish faster depending on round settings. You are booking time, not guaranteed holes.

faq.question: Is Divots kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, we are kid-friendly. We offer Kids loaner clubs and provide a fun and exciting experience for guests of all ages and skill levels.
